menu.welcome_text:
👋Hi!
 The God of random will help you create a giveaway on the channel.
 Are you ready to create a new giveaway?
menu.invite:
Share the bot with your friends by sending them the bot username 
 @RandomGodBot

draw.chanel_id:
Enter the username of the channel where the giveaway will be published in @username format.  You must be the administrator of this channel and add bot to the administrators.
 If the channel is private, then you need to send the id of this channel to find out the id of the private channel, forward any post from this channel to the special bot @getmyid_bot, the bottom line is the response from the bot and will be the id of your private channel.  Forward this id to the bot
draw.chanel_id_check:
Enter the username of the channel for verification in @username format.
 
 If the channel is private, then you need to send the id of this channel to find out the id of the private channel, forward any post from this channel to the special bot @getmyid_bot, the bottom line is the response from the bot and will be the id of your private channel.  Forward this id to the bot.
 Indicate the link to this channel in the description so that the participants of the giveaway know which channels you need to subscribe
draw.chanel_twitch_check: Enter Twitch channel for verification (login, @login or link like https://twitch.tv/login)
draw.not_admin: For publish the giveaway, you must be the administrator of this channel.  Send username as administrator
draw.not_in_chanel: The bot is not the administrator of this channel.  Add bot to admins and submit @username again
draw.tg_channel_exists: This Telegram channel is already added
draw.draw_text: Enter a description of the giveaway. Tip: describe what the prizes will be, how many winners there will be and what each of them will win, which channels the participants need to subscribe to, and indicate the date and time of the end of the giveaway. You can use the html markup. 1)Bold text - your text 2)Italic text - your text 3)Hyperlink to channel - your text. Link must be in this format: https://t.me/channel
draw.file: Send a picture or GIF (optional, if not needed, send any other message)
draw.post_time: Enter the giveaway start date/time in format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (UTC+0). Example: 2020-10-25 21:05. Note: use leading zeros (02:05)
draw.end_time: Enter the giveaway end date/time in format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (UTC+0). Example: 2020-10-31 21:55. Note: use leading zeros (02:05)
draw.utc_time_note: All time must be entered in UTC+0
draw.over_time: This time has already passed. Enter a date/time later than now
draw.post_biger: Start time must be earlier than end time
draw.change_text: What do you need to change in the giveaway?
draw.submit_text: The giveaway has been created and will be published on the channel at the selected time
draw.not_subscribe: @RandomGodBot: You haven't subscribed to all channels, please read the giveaway discription carefully and subscribe to all necessary channels to participate
draw.need_twitch_link: @RandomGodBot: You need to link your Twitch account via /twitch to participate
draw.need_twitch_link_hint: To participate in this giveaway, link your Twitch account first.
draw.not_follow_twitch: @RandomGodBot: You are not following required Twitch channels:
draw.twitch_check_error: Failed to verify Twitch follow status. Try again later
draw.join_failed: Failed to join giveaway. Try again
draw.twitch_not_configured: Twitch check is temporarily unavailable. Admin did not configure Twitch API
draw.twitch_auth_failed: Failed to start Twitch authorization. Try again later
draw.twitch_auth_pending: Authorization is not completed yet. Confirm code in browser
draw.twitch_channel_invalid: Invalid Twitch login. Example: ninja or https://twitch.tv/ninja
draw.twitch_channel_exists: This Twitch channel is already added:
draw.failed_post: Failed to send the giveaway because the channel was deleted

my_draw.no_draw: You have no pending or active giveaways
my_draw.action_forbidden: This action is available only to the giveaway owner

my_part.no_draw: You are not participating in any giveaways
